    <requires>CLI: tmux</requires>
  </skill>
  <skill available="true">
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts (no API key required).</description>
    <location>/workspace/nanobot/nanobot/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</skills>

1. BrowserScan - Robot Detection/WebDriver | BrowserScan
   https://www.browserscan.net/bot-detection

2. Pixelscan | Fast multi-checktool for detection analysis
   https://pixelscan.net/
   Pixelscan is a complete multi-checktool forbrowserfingerprinting, proxy detection, IP analysis, DNS leaks, and more. See how detectable your setup really is.Your test results are not stored or linked to any identity. You stay fully incontrolof your setup and yourdata.
3. DNSChecker- DNSCheckPropagation Tool
   https://dnschecker.org/
   DNSCheckerprovides name server propagationcheckinstantly. Changed nameservers so do a DNS lookup andcheckif DNS and nameservers have propagated.
4. Browserleaks -Checkyourbrowserfor privacy leaks
   https://browserleaks.com/
   This includes information such as User-Agent, screen resolution,systemlanguage, local time, CPU architecture, the number of logical cores, the batterystatus, network information, installed plugins, and more.TLS Client Test.Checkyourbrowser's supported SSL/TLSprotocols.
5. Cache-Controlheader - HTTP | MDN
   https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Reference/Headers/Cache-Control
   The HTTP Cache-Controlheader holds directives (instructions) in both requests and responses thatcontrolcaching inbrowsersand shared caches (e.g., Proxies, CDNs).
